title: invoice — Eloquent observers
description: Three observers enforce the module's write-time invariants: invoice lifecycle integrity (sequential numbering + address freeze + state machine + finalize-immutability + marketing signal fire), line integrity (draft-only mutation + line-number assignment + tax dispatch), and credit-note immutability (post-paid-only issuance + no updates + no deletes ever).

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `ivc_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `invoice_capture` entitlement (returns `INVOICE_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when tenant hit `invoice_slot_per_month` cap (Small=100, Medium=1000, Enterprise=∞; returns `INVOICE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED`)

creating → generate invoice_number via sequential per-tenant-per-year counter using Postgres advisory lock `pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('invoice_seq:' || tenant_id || ':' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM now())))` — guarantees no gaps + no duplicates under concurrent writes; format = '{YYYY}-{000001}' when invoice_series='INV' else '{SERIES}-{YYYY}-{000001}'
creating → refuse when invoice_series is not 'INV' AND tenant does NOT hold `invoice_custom_series` entitlement (Medium+ only; returns `INVOICE_CUSTOM_SERIES_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when currency != tenant.default_currency AND tenant does NOT hold `invoice_multi_currency` entitlement (Medium+ only; returns `INVOICE_MULTI_CURRENCY_NOT_ENTITLED`)

creating → freeze billing_address jsonb from customer.profile (name, street, city, state, postal_code, country, phone, email) — snapshot semantics identical to membership.tax_calculation_snapshot per hierarchy.md §6
creating → freeze shipping_address jsonb (optional; defaults to billing_address when null)
creating → freeze customer_tax_id from customer.profile.tax_id (VAT/GST/EIN) — required for VAT-jurisdiction invoices per compliance.json
creating → freeze currency at issuance (immutable post-create)

creating → set issue_date = today; compute due_date from payment_terms (due_on_receipt = issue_date; net_15 = issue_date + 15 days; net_30 = +30; net_60 = +60; custom = issue_date + payment_terms_custom_days)
creating → refuse when payment_terms='custom' AND payment_terms_custom_days is NULL or <= 0 (returns `INVOICE_INVALID_CUSTOM_TERMS`)
creating → refuse when customer.tenant_id != invoice.tenant_id (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling)
creating → refuse when membership_id set AND membership.tenant_id != invoice.tenant_id (same guard)
creating → initialise status='draft' + subtotal_cents=0 + discount_amount_cents=0 + tax_amount_cents=0 + total_cents=0 + amount_paid_cents=0 + amount_due_cents=0
creating → set issued_by_user_id from Auth::id() when actor is a User (null for system-created invoices via CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated hook)
creating → fire InvoiceCreated after commit
updating (status → open, i.e. draft → open — the FINALIZE transition) → require line_count > 0 (returns `INVOICE_FINALIZE_REQUIRES_LINES`)

updating (status → open) → require every invoice_line has tax_calculation_id set (returns `INVOICE_FINALIZE_REQUIRES_TAX_COMPUTED` — dispatches CalculateInvoiceTaxJob for any missing when tax module supports async computation)
updating (status → open) → recompute subtotal_cents = SUM(invoice_lines.subtotal_cents)
updating (status → open) → recompute discount_amount_cents = SUM(invoice_lines.discount_amount_cents)
updating (status → open) → recompute tax_amount_cents = SUM(invoice_lines.tax_amount_cents)
updating (status → open) → recompute total_cents = subtotal_cents - discount_amount_cents + tax_amount_cents
updating (status → open) → set amount_due_cents = total_cents - amount_paid_cents
updating (status → open) → FREEZE totals (subtotal_cents, discount_amount_cents, tax_amount_cents, total_cents become immutable)
updating (status → open) → refuse when caller lacks admin+finance role (returns `INVOICE_FINALIZE_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE`)
updating (status → open) → dispatch GenerateInvoicePDFJob + SendInvoiceEmailJob after commit
updating (status → open) → fire InvoiceFinalized
updating (status → paid) → require amount_paid_cents == total_cents (returns `INVOICE_PAID_REQUIRES_FULL_PAYMENT` — defense-in-depth against payment module drift)
updating (status → paid) → set paid_at = now()
updating (status → paid) → set amount_due_cents = 0
updating (status → paid) → fire InvoicePaid (which triggers marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent when membership_id set + membership::ActivateMembershipOnInvoicePaid when applicable)
updating (status → partially_paid) → require 0 < amount_paid_cents < total_cents
updating (status → partially_paid) → recompute amount_due_cents = total_cents - amount_paid_cents
updating (status → partially_paid) → fire InvoicePartiallyPaid
updating (status → void) → REFUSE when previous status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid') → return `INVOICE_VOID_FORBIDDEN_AFTER_PAYMENT` — must issue credit note instead
updating (status → void) → require void_reason present (returns `INVOICE_VOID_REASON_REQUIRED`)
updating (status → void) → require caller has admin+finance role (returns `INVOICE_VOID_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE`)
updating (status → void) → set voided_at = now()
updating (status → void) → fire InvoiceVoided
updating (status → uncollectible) → require days_past_due >= config('invoice.dunning.uncollectible_after_days', 90) (returns `INVOICE_NOT_ENOUGH_DAYS_PAST_DUE`)
updating (status → uncollectible) → require caller has admin+finance role
updating (status → uncollectible) → fire InvoiceUncollectible
updating (status → past_due) → set collection_status='pending' when previously NULL
updating (status → past_due) → dispatch DispatchDunningRemindersJob with cadence config (day+3 / day+7 / day+14 / day+30 / day+60)
updating (status → past_due) → fire InvoicePastDue
updating (status → refunded) → set state_reason='refunded_in_full' + require existing CreditNote linked via applied_to_type='refund'
updating (status → refunded) → fire InvoiceRefunded
updating (status → disputed) → require existing chargeback record from chargeback module
updating (status → disputed) → fire InvoiceDisputed
updating (line_count / totals mutated AFTER status=open) → REFUSE — finalized invoices are IMMUTABLE (returns `INVOICE_IMMUTABLE_AFTER_FINALIZE`); issue credit note or new invoice instead
updating (billing_address / shipping_address / customer_tax_id / currency changed) → REFUSE ALL — snapshots are immutable after create (returns `INVOICE_SNAPSHOT_IMMUTABLE`)
updating (invoice_number changed) → REFUSE — sequential numbering is immutable per GAAP (returns `INVOICE_NUMBER_IMMUTABLE`)
updating (issue_date changed) → REFUSE — issue date is immutable per GAAP
updating (state → written_off) → require previous state = past_due AND days_past_due >= config('invoice.collection.write_off_after_days', 180) (returns `INVOICE_WRITE_OFF_TOO_EARLY`)
updating (state → written_off) → fire InvoiceWrittenOff
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when status NOT IN ('draft', 'void') — must be pre-payment (returns `INVOICE_SOFT_DELETE_FORBIDDEN`)
deleting (hard-delete) → refuse when < 7 years past created_at (financial retention; 10 years for Enterprise with invoice_extended_retention entitlement)
creating → populate ULID prefix `ivl_`
creating → refuse when parent invoice.status != 'draft' (returns `INVOICE_LINE_PARENT_NOT_DRAFT` — finalized invoices are immutable)
creating → refuse when tenant_id != parent invoice.tenant_id (defense-in-depth)
creating → assign line_number = MAX(line_number) + 1 for the parent invoice (starts at 1)
creating → validate quantity > 0 (returns `INVOICE_LINE_INVALID_QUANTITY` — no zero or negative line quantities)
creating → validate unit_price_cents >= 0 (returns `INVOICE_LINE_INVALID_UNIT_PRICE` — negative prices only allowed via item_type='discount_line')
creating → validate unit_currency == parent invoice.currency (returns `INVOICE_LINE_CURRENCY_MISMATCH` — multi-currency mixing forbidden within one invoice)
creating → compute subtotal_cents = ROUND(quantity × unit_price_cents) with bankers' rounding (avoids half-cent bias)
creating → compute total_cents = subtotal_cents - discount_amount_cents + tax_amount_cents

creating → dispatch CalculateInvoiceTaxJob when tax_calculation_id is NULL AND item_type IN ('membership_charge', 'addon', 'setup_fee', 'one_time_service') — tax lines + discount lines + adjustments skip
creating → refuse when coupon_redemption_id set AND coupon_redemption.tenant_id != tenant_id (guard)
creating → refuse when coupon_redemption_id set AND coupon_redemption.status != 'reserved' (returns `INVOICE_LINE_COUPON_ALREADY_APPLIED` — coupon module ensures reservation)
creating → fire InvoiceLineAdded after commit
updating → refuse when parent invoice.status != 'draft' (returns `INVOICE_LINE_PARENT_NOT_DRAFT`)
updating (item_type changed) → REFUSE — item_type is set at create + immutable
updating (line_number changed) → REFUSE — line_number is assigned by observer + immutable
updating (quantity or unit_price_cents changed) → recompute subtotal_cents + total_cents; invalidate tax_calculation_id (set to NULL); dispatch CalculateInvoiceTaxJob for the new totals
updating (tax_calculation_id set from NULL → value) → verify tax_calculation.subject_id matches the invoice line + tax_calculation.tenant_id == tenant_id
updating → fire InvoiceLineUpdated
deleting → refuse when parent invoice.status != 'draft'
deleting → re-number remaining lines (line_number 1..N contiguous) after delete commits
deleting → recompute parent invoice.subtotal_cents / discount_amount_cents / tax_amount_cents / total_cents / amount_due_cents
deleting → fire InvoiceLineRemoved
deleting (hard-delete) → REFUSE for lines on finalized invoices — financial retention (cascaded via FK RESTRICT)
creating → populate ULID prefix `crn_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `credit_note_issuance` entitlement (returns `CREDIT_NOTE_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`)

creating → refuse when parent invoice.status NOT IN ('paid', 'partially_paid', 'refunded', 'disputed', 'written_off') → return `CREDIT_NOTE_REQUIRES_PAID_INVOICE` — credit notes REVERSE paid invoices only; voided/unfinalized invoices are handled by voiding, not crediting
creating → refuse when tenant_id != parent invoice.tenant_id (defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when currency != parent invoice.currency (returns `CREDIT_NOTE_CURRENCY_MISMATCH`)
creating → generate credit_note_number via sequential per-tenant-per-year counter using Postgres advisory lock; format = 'CN-{YYYY}-{000001}'
creating → validate amount_cents > 0 (returns `CREDIT_NOTE_INVALID_AMOUNT` — always positive; the credit note REPRESENTS money owed BACK to customer, sign convention is positive)

creating → validate amount_cents + SUM(existing_credit_notes.amount_cents for this original_invoice) <= original_invoice.total_cents (returns `CREDIT_NOTE_AMOUNT_EXCEEDS_ORIGINAL` — cannot credit more than the invoice was for)
creating → compute tax_amount_cents proportionally: (amount_cents / original_invoice.total_cents) × original_invoice.tax_amount_cents (rounded via bankers')
creating → set issue_date = today
creating → set issued_by_user_id from Auth::id() (required — cannot be null; returns `CREDIT_NOTE_ISSUER_REQUIRED`)
creating → refuse when issued_by_user_id lacks admin+finance role (returns `CREDIT_NOTE_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE`)
creating → set status='draft' + replay_attempts=0
creating → validate reason is one of the enum: refund / adjustment / write_off / duplicate / customer_dispute_resolved / accounting_correction
creating → require reason_note non-empty when reason IN ('adjustment', 'customer_dispute_resolved', 'accounting_correction') → return `CREDIT_NOTE_REASON_NOTE_REQUIRED`
creating → dispatch GenerateCreditNotePDFJob after commit
creating → fire CreditNoteCreated
updating (status → issued) → require pdf_url is set (PDF generation completed)
updating (status → issued) → fire CreditNoteIssued
updating (status → applied) → require applied_to_type + applied_to_id are set
updating (status → applied) → validate applied_to_type IN ('refund', 'next_invoice', 'customer_balance')
updating (status → applied) → validate the applied_to target exists + is same-tenant
updating (status → applied) → fire CreditNoteApplied
updating (status → voided) → REFUSE when previous status IN ('issued', 'applied') → return `CREDIT_NOTE_VOID_FORBIDDEN_AFTER_ISSUE` — issued/applied credit notes are IMMUTABLE financial records
updating (status → voided) → require void_reason present
updating (status → voided) → require caller is admin+finance
updating (status → voided) → fire CreditNoteVoided

updating (amount_cents / currency / original_invoice_id / credit_note_number / issue_date changed) → REFUSE ALL — every field except status + applied_to_* + pdf_url is immutable after create (returns `CREDIT_NOTE_FIELD_IMMUTABLE`)
updating (reason changed) → REFUSE — reason is set at create + immutable
deleting → REFUSE ALL — credit notes are financial audit records; retained for 7 years (10 for Enterprise); no soft delete; no hard delete except via TenantErased FK CASCADE
